programme.title: CBS News Sunday Morning
programme.desc: The sparkling notes of a trumpet fanfare and the familiar logo of the sun alert viewers that it's time for CBS's Sunday morning staple. Journalist Jane Pauley helms the show, taking over hosting duties from Charles Osgood, who spent 22 years on the job. A morning talk show, this program airs at a different pace and focuses much of its attention on the performing arts. After a quick update of the day's news and national weather, correspondents offer longer-length segments on a variety of topics, from architecture to ballet to music to pop culture to politics.

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: The top-notch team of hosts Bob McKeown, Gillian Findlay, Mark Kelley and Habiba Nosheen provides unique and engaging documentaries from Canada and beyond. "The Fifth Estate" is a reference to the term Fourth Estate, and was chosen to highlight the program's determination to go beyond everyday news into original journalism. The series has won numerous awards for its reporting, including Gemini Awards, International Emmys, the Michener Award, and even an Academy Award for a 1981 episode that was released in theaters the following year. Since September 1975, Canadians have tuned in to experience interesting stories that are always well-crafted and thought-provoking.

programme.desc: Mike Slater examines the stark contrast between worldly justice systems-often flawed by human bias, political agendas, and incomplete accountability-and God's perfect, eternal judgment that weighs the heart and ultimate truth. Drawing from biblical principles and current events, the discussion highlights how earthly courts and policies can fail to deliver true righteousness, leaving believers anxious amid injustice, while divine judgment promises impartiality, mercy for the repentant, and accountability for all. Listeners are encouraged to find peace not in relying on fallible human institutions, but in trusting God's sovereign authority over every ruler, law, and outcome.

programme.desc: With the promise of an inheritance from her grandfather spurring a former child prodigy, Emma Rayburn promises to tutor young and gifted violinist, Ava Field, unaware her grandfather is playing matchmaker from the grave.

programme.title: Love at the Lodge
programme.desc: Emma, an uptight attorney hoping to make partner, finds herself stranded at a lodge where her firm was supposed to have their corporate retreat, and falling for the carefree owner Liam – until she's tasked with convincing him to sell.

programme.title: This Little Love of Mine
programme.desc: A workaholic lawyer returns to her island home to convince an old friend to take over his family's company - but rekindled feelings soon get in the way.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: Baked with a Kiss
programme.desc: A baker who is famous for her “True Love Pie” accidentally gives the wrong dessert to a difficult customer and ends up the object of his affection.

programme.title: So You Said Yes
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A bridal shop owner clashes with the a competing business's owner.

programme.title: Tulips in Spring
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Rose returns home to mend her damaged relationship with her father.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. The whole town anxiously awaits the impending blooming of the Middleton.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. The Middleton Merriwick is still not in bloom.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. Two guests arrive at Grey House and are immediately at odds.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. The town is caught up in romance when Cassie helps Ben find an old film.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. When a visiting chef is unable to relax, Cassie arranges for a day at the stove.

programme.title: Miracle
programme.desc: When college coach Herb Brooks (Kurt Russell) is hired to helm the 1980 U.S. men's Olympic hockey team, he brings a unique and brash style to the ice. After assembling a team of hot-headed college all-stars, who are humiliated in an early match, Brooks unites his squad against a common foe, the heavily-favored Soviet team. As the U.S. squad tries to overcome insurmountable odds and win the gold medal, the team becomes a microcosm for American patriotism during the Cold War.

programme.title: K-19: The Widowmaker
programme.desc: Follows Captain Alexei Vostrikov who, at the height of the Cold War, is ordered to take over command of the nuclear missile submarine K-19, pride of the Soviet Navy. His assignment: Prepare the K-19 for sea and take her out on patrol -- no matter what the cost. But problems with the K-19 arise that may lead to a core meltdown and explosion that will certainly kill all aboard, and possibly trigger a nuclear war. Vostrikov must choose between his orders and the lives of his men.

programme.title: Blindspotting
programme.desc: Collin must make it through his final three days of probation for a chance at a new beginning in his Oakland, Calif., neighborhood. His bond with his volatile best friend soon gets tested when Collin sees a police officer shoot a suspect in the back during a chase through the streets. Things soon come to a head when the buddies attend a party at the upscale home of a young and wealthy tech entrepreneur.

programme.title: Akeelah and the Bee
programme.desc: Akeelah, an 11-year-old girl living in South Los Angeles, discovers she has a talent for spelling, which she hopes will take her to the National Spelling Bee. Despite her mother's objections, Akeelah doesn't give up on her goal. She finds help in the form of a mysterious teacher, and along with overwhelming support from her community, Akeelah might just have what it takes to make her dream come true.

programme.title: Miracle
programme.desc: When college coach Herb Brooks (Kurt Russell) is hired to helm the 1980 U.S. men's Olympic hockey team, he brings a unique and brash style to the ice. After assembling a team of hot-headed college all-stars, who are humiliated in an early match, Brooks unites his squad against a common foe, the heavily-favored Soviet team. As the U.S. squad tries to overcome insurmountable odds and win the gold medal, the team becomes a microcosm for American patriotism during the Cold War.

programme.title: K-19: The Widowmaker

But problems with the K-19 arise that may lead to a core meltdown and explosion that will certainly kill all aboard, and possibly trigger a nuclear war. Vostrikov must choose between his orders and the lives of his men.

programme.title: The 51st State
programme.desc: The 51st State is the story of Elmo McElroy (Samuel L. Jackson), a streetwise American master chemist, who heads to England to set up his last big deal -- to introduce a new designer drug to the European market. McElroy soon becomes embroiled in a web of double-dealing as he's escorted around Liverpool's underworld and rave scene by rabid local hood Felix De Souza (Robert Carlyle), who hates all things American.

programme.title: Blue Iguana
programme.desc: Ex-jailbirds Eddie and Paul are on parole and working in a New York diner, and their lives seem to be at a dead end. Then, English lawyer Katherine Rookwood walks into the diner with an offer they can't refuse.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Blood and Money
programme.desc: A retired veteran (Tom Berenger) hunting in the Allagash backcountry discovers a dead woman with a duffle bag full of money. He soon finds himself in a web of deceit and murder.

programme.title: Operation Seawolf
programme.desc: During World War II, Germany looks to its last remaining weapons and soldiers to defeat the Allies. Led by Capt. Hans Kessler, a grizzled submarine commander, the German navy sends U-boats across the sea for a daring mission to attack the U.S. homeland. Meanwhile, the American military devises its own strategy to hunt down and destroy all enemy subs before they reach their target.

programme.title: Operator
programme.desc: When the daughter of a dispatcher and a cop is kidnapped, they are forced to follow the kidnapper's rules and have to choose to save their daughter or the city.

programme.title: The 51st State
programme.desc: The 51st State is the story of Elmo McElroy (Samuel L. Jackson), a streetwise American master chemist, who heads to England to set up his last big deal -- to introduce a new designer drug to the European market. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: A House on Fire
programme.desc: Deborah had the epitome of a perfect life. But not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: True stories of women in peril as told by the people involved. Shortly after earning her degree at Northern Kentucky University.

programme.title: Taken in Broad Daylight
programme.desc: The true story of 17 year old Anne Sluti.

programme.title: A Dangerous Date
programme.desc: Introduced to online dating, a single father learns the dangerous pitfalls.

programme.title: A House on Fire
programme.desc: Deborah had the epitome of a perfect life. But not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents: Tempted By Love
programme.desc: Featuring Garcelle Beauvais. Ava rushes home to care for her elderly aunt in South Carolina.

programme.title: New
programme.desc: Kendra takes time off to heal her soul and meets the man of her dreams, Malcolm.

programme.title: New
programme.desc: Featuring Keri Hilson. Cherish and Roxy are the hottest singing duo, but sibling rivalry runs deep.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents: Tempted By Love
programme.desc: Featuring Garcelle Beauvais. Ava rushes home to care for her elderly aunt in South Carolina.

programme.title: The Giver
programme.desc: Jonas (Brenton Thwaites) lives in a seemingly idyllic world of conformity and contentment. When he begins to spend time with The Giver (Jeff Bridges), an old man who is the sole keeper of the community's memories, Jonas discovers the dangerous truths of his community's secret past. Armed with the power of knowledge, Jonas realizes that he must escape from their world to protect himself and those he loves -- a challenge no one has ever completed successfully.

programme.title: Knowing
programme.desc: Fifty years after it was buried in a time capsule, a schoolgirl's cryptic document falls into the hands of Caleb Koestler, the son of professor John Koestler (Nicolas Cage). John figures out that the encoded message accurately lists every major disaster from the past five decades, and predicts three future calamities -- one a global cataclysm. When his warnings fall on deaf ears, John enlists the help of the prophetic author's daughter and granddaughter to try to avert the ultimate disaster.

programme.title: Moonfall
programme.desc: The world stands on the brink of annihilation when a mysterious force knocks the moon from its orbit and sends it hurtling toward a collision course with Earth. With only weeks before impact, NASA executive Jocinda "Jo" Fowler teams up with a man from her past and a conspiracy theorist for an impossible mission into space to save humanity.

programme.title: Ender's Game
programme.desc: When hostile aliens called the Formics attack Earth, only the legendary heroics of Mazer Rackham (Ben Kingsley) manage to attain a victory. To prepare for the next attack, Col. Hyrum Graff (Harrison Ford) and his cohorts initiate a military program to find the next Mazer. Recruit Ender Wiggin (Asa Butterfield) exhibits an unusual gift for the training, easily mastering all of the challenges thrown at him. Mazer Rackham, himself, takes Ender as a protege to prepare him for the oncoming war.

programme.title: Super 8
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The Turtles are back to battle a bigger threat alongside April O'Neil and vigilante Casey Jones. As they prepare to take on supervillain Shredder and his henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, they find themselves facing an even greater evil: the sinister Krang.

programme.title: Secret Headquarters
programme.desc: Young Charlie Kincaid, who discovers a secret headquarters under his home that seems to belong to a superhero. He shares it with his friends, and they start to believe that his estranged father might have a secret double life.

programme.title: Super 8
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: In need of a vacation from his ordinary life, factory worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall, a company that can turn dreams into real memories. Thinking that memories of life as a superspy are just the ticket, Quaid undergoes the procedure -- but it goes horribly wrong. Suddenly, Quaid is a hunted man. He teams up with a rebel fighter on a search to find the head of the underground resistance and take down the leader of the free world.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: In 2019 a mercenary (Djimon Hounsou) pursues two clones (Ewan McGregor, Scarlett Johansson) who escaped from a research facility after learning their true fate.

programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane
programme.desc: After surviving a car accident, Michelle (Mary Elizabeth Winstead) wakes up to find herself in an underground bunker with two men. Howard (John Goodman) tells her that a massive chemical attack has rendered the air unbreathable, and their only hope of survival is to remain inside. Despite the comforts of home, Howard's controlling and menacing nature makes Michelle want to escape. After taking matters into her own hands, the young woman finally discovers the truth about the outside world.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: During the Vietnam War, soldier Luc Devereaux (Jean-Claude Van Damme) finds that his superior officer, Andrew Scott (Dolph Lundgren), has turned violently deranged, and the two fight to the death. After their bodies are retrieved, they are placed into a secret program in which they are reanimated and trained to become unquestioning killing machines. While Devereaux and Scott initially have no memory of their former lives, glimpses of their pasts start to return, rekindling their intense conflict.

programme.title: Random Hearts
programme.desc: A congresswoman and a cop investigate their spouses's relationship when they are killed in a plane crash.

programme.title: Air Force One
programme.desc: Thriller about the hijacking of Air Force One with the First Family on board.

programme.title: Thunderheart
programme.desc: An FBI agent is sent to a South Dakota indian reservation to capture a radical native American protester.

programme.title: The Fuller Brush Girl
programme.desc: Milquetoast Humphrey Briggs (Eddie Albert) and his impetuous girlfriend, Sally Elliot (Lucille Ball), are office workers at a shipping firm whose corrupt owner, Harvey Simpson (Jerome Cowan), uses his company as a front for a massive smuggling operation. When an accident causes Simpson's rich and jealous wife (Lee Patrick) to assume he's cheating on her, the lovebirds get unwillingly drawn into a murder investigation involving a stripper (Gale Robbins) and a hired killer (Fred Graham).

programme.title: Good Neighbor Sam
programme.desc: Sam Bissell (Jack Lemmon) is an advertising executive who loves his wife, Min (Dorothy Provine), and his family as much as he loves peace and quiet. When Janet Lagerlof (Romy Schneider), an old acquaintance, inherits a sizable fortune, Bissell is talked into pretending to be her husband in order to fulfill a legal requirement. Things get even more complicated when Ms. Langerlof is introduced to Bissell's employer, Simon Nurdlinger (Edward G. Robinson), as Mrs. Bissell.

programme.title: It Should Happen to You
programme.desc: After two years of failing to make it big in New York City, small-town model and actress Gladys Glover (Judy Holliday) takes a gamble by investing in billboard advertising to get her name out there. Almost immediately her risk pays off, and she finds herself inundated with media requests and fans, including the affections of the wealthy Evan Adams III (Peter Lawford) of the Adams Soap company. While Glover enjoys the spotlight, her boyfriend (Jack Lemmon) is less pleased about it.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: Three-time male model of the year, Derek Zoolander, is devastated when he loses the title to newbie Hansel. After the news, Mugatu's fashion empire brainwashes Derek into being an assassin.

programme.title: Zoolander 2
programme.desc: When the world's most beautiful people are in danger, former models Derek and Hansel are recruited for a top secret mission to defeat the criminal mastermind Mugatu. Prepare for a dangerously sexy adventure where looks really can kill.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
programme.desc: Mike and Carol have just one week to come up with $20,000 in back taxes, or they'll lose their house to a neighbor. Even worse, Marcia gets a swollen nose on date night, Cindy's addicted to tattling, and Jan's hearing a psychotic inner voice.

programme.title: A Very Brady Sequel
programme.desc: Mike (Gary Cole) is a planning a surprise wedding anniversary party for Carol (Shelly Long) - until Carol's long-lost first husband, Roy (Tim Matheson), shows up to shake the family tree.

programme.title: Josie and the Pussycats
programme.desc: Josie, Melody and Val are three small-town girl musicians determined to take their rock band out of their garage and straight to the top, while remaining true to their look, style and sound. They get a record deal which brings fame and fortune but soon realize they are pawns of two people who want to control the youth of America. They must clear their names, even if it means losing fame and fortune.

programme.title: Wild Child
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Poppy (Emma Roberts) has everything her unlimited credit cards can buy, and a spoiled attitude to match. After a final thoughtless prank, her exasperated father (Aidan Quinn) ships her off to boarding school in England. There, Poppy meets her match in a stern headmistress (Natasha Richardson) and a class full of girls who will not tolerate her selfishness.

programme.title: Billy Elliot
programme.desc: The life of 11-year-old Billy Elliot, a coal miner's son in Northern England, is forever changed one day when he stumbles upon a ballet class during his weekly boxing lesson. Before long, he finds himself in dance, demonstrating the kind of raw talent seldom seen by the class' exacting instructor, Mrs. Wilkinson. With a tart tongue and a never-ending stream of cigarettes in her hand, Mrs. Wilkinson's zest for teaching is revived when she sees Billy's potential.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: Following their high-school graduation, Jade Butterfield (Gabriella Wilde), a sheltered but privileged teen, becomes enthralled with David Elliot (Alex Pettyfer), a working-class youth with a troubled past. Though Jade and David quickly fall in love, Jade's father (Bruce Greenwood) strongly disapproves of the relationship, while David's father (Robert Patrick) advises caution. However, their parents' disapproval only makes the love-struck teens more determined to pursue the intense affair.

programme.title: Already Tomorrow in Hong Kong
programme.desc: A budding attraction develops between a U.S. expatriate (Bryan Greenberg) and a Chinese-American woman (Jamie Chung) who's visiting Hong Kong for a business trip.

programme.title: Grind
programme.desc: A Chicago teenager (Mike Vogel) and his friends (Vince Vieluf, Adam Brody) travel across America to watch a legendary skateboarder compete.

programme.title: On Golden Pond
programme.desc: Cantankerous retiree Norman Thayer (Henry Fonda) and his conciliatory wife, Ethel (Katharine Hepburn), spend summers at their New England vacation home on the shores of idyllic Golden Pond. This year, their adult daughter, Chelsea (Jane Fonda), visits with her new fiancée and his teenage son, Billy (Doug McKeon) on their way to Europe. After leaving Billy behind to bond with Norman, Chelsea returns, attempting to repair the long-strained relationship with her aging father before it's too late.

programme.title: Georgia Rule
programme.desc: Teenage Rachel (Lindsay Lohan) is a real thorn in the side of her mother, Lilly (Felicity Huffman). More than just rebellious, she is incorrigible. After Rachel crashes a car, Lilly decides to haul the girl off to a place to which she vowed never to return: Her own mother's (Jane Fonda) Idaho home. Georgia, the family matriarch, lives by a strict code and expects all under her roof to do the same. Given structure and purpose, Rachel's anger at the world begins to subside.

programme.title: The Love Issue
programme.desc: A beauty editor finds a fake boyfriend when her ex-boyfriend (and boss) gets engaged.

programme.title: The Soulmate Search
programme.desc: Lindsay and Will bond after agreeing the dating service that matched them has made a mistake.

programme.title: The Love Gala
programme.desc: When planning her mom's Garden Gala, Kate must compromise with the head of the Botanical Garden.

programme.title: The Proposal Spot
programme.desc: The owner of a popular cafe must convince a celeb and his fiancé to reunite to save her reputation.

programme.title: Best Friend From Heaven
programme.desc: When her dog is killed, Tara cancels her wedding. But her dog's ghost and her small town have a surprise.

programme.title: The Recon
programme.desc: One day at early dawn a search unit near the DMZ the front line is on alert. It was because a soldier from another unit's GP ran away to DMZ with a gun. Under Commander Baek the 3rd platoon members led by First Lieutenant Cho are put into the operation to arrest the deserter. The search begins and at the same time First Lieutenant Lim's dead body is found at the unit's official residence. The accident is reported to the Division Headquarters and Captain Kang who is about to be discharged arrives at the search unit with an army surgeon. The commander and the army surgeon are rushing to conclude Lim's case with suicide but Kang suspects that there is a deep secret in this accident. At that time the soldiers who were put into the operations get killed one by one and the dark truth between Lim's death and the deserter search operation is revealed.

programme.title: The Plan Man
programme.desc: A meticulous librarian's love plan is shaken by a free-spirited musician pushing him to face the world.

programme.title: Architecture 101
programme.desc: Seung-min designs a house for his old crush and they are whisked back to the past which stirs old memories.

programme.title: Life is Beautiful
programme.desc: A wife asks her husband to find her first love for her birthday leading to an unexpected journey together.

programme.title: 200 Pounds Beauty
programme.desc: A talented but obese girl, who ghost-sings for a not-so-talented pop star, undergoes extensive plastic surgery to become a slender beauty with a new identity.

programme.title: Springtime
programme.desc: A trumpet sound that will echo through your heart.

programme.title: Best Mistake 1 : The Movie (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: Kim Yeon Do (Lee Eun Jae) is a studious high school girl whose life is being made miserable by a boy from her past. Despite all of her efforts, she can't get peace as he won't leave her alone. So she hatches a plan. On her social media pages, she posts a picture of another boy, in the hope that this move will put an end to the irritation. But this move turns out to have unexpected consequences: It turns out that the boy in the picture is actually one of her schoolmates. Named Ji Hyun Ho (Kang Yul), he is a bit of a loose cannon. Although he is very popular, he dislikes studying - and prefers play. The rest of the school soon learns about the social media post, as news spreads fast in the classroom! This leads to a number of run-ins with ji Hyun Ho. But the more they get to know one another, the closer they get - causing yet further complications for a whole host of classmates!

programme.title: Whispering Corridors 6 : The Humming (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: Ha-young hears humming in the empty washroom and believes that Eun-hee, who was hired as a vice-principal of the school is somehow linked to the mystery.

programme.title: Bloodlines
programme.desc: Sydney Carter is a restless college student that has always felt out of place. When she discovers she's adopted, her world beings to unravel, and she embarks on a journey to discover her origins, but they come at a cost, and could destroy everything she's ever known.

programme.title: Blowback
programme.desc: Former Navy SEAL Ares Sterling, a family man with a dark past, lives peacefully until his wife Lisa is kidnapped after a home invasion. Desperate, Ares seeks help from his estranged father, King, a crime boss he blames for his tragic childhood. Ares revisits the shadows of his past, becoming ruthless to save Lisa and protect his daughter from similar loss, uncovering shocking secrets along the way.

programme.title: His Masterpiece
programme.desc: Victoria and Richard are divorced spouses that operate an art gallery together. After meeting young artist Daniel at a community event, they decide to collaborate with him on the exhibit to generate income for their tax obligations. However, Richard's aggressive nature and ulterior motives soon come to light, leading to a dangerous jealousy within him.

programme.title: A Wonderful Lie
programme.desc: Fading romance author Rebecca Sinclair concocts a desperate plan to reignite her dwindling career and fractured marriage. She creates a web of lies and her twisted plot leaves her trapped in a nightmare of her own making. Rebecca must scramble to keep control or risk being consumed by the very deception of her own doing.

programme.title: Go West, Young Girl
programme.desc: A naive young woman travels to the Arizona Territory in 1886 in the hopes of becoming a reporter.

programme.title: The Phantom Stagecoach
programme.desc: An undercover Wells Fargo agent discovers robberies plaguing a stagecoach are the work of a rival company.

programme.title: The Last Posse
programme.desc: A sheriff's posse sets out after three scoundrels who've robbed a prominent rancher.

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone
programme.desc: En route back to Texas, Buchanan rides into a California town and becomes embroiled in a violent family fued.

programme.title: Gunfighters
programme.desc: A fast gunslinger cuts a corrupt cattle baron down to size when the baron selfishly monopolizes the market.

programme.title: Wagons East!
programme.desc: They came for gold, but now they'll settle for indoor plumbing. John Candy and Richard Lewis star in this hilariously unconventional look at the legendary West.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Based upon the Pulitzer Prize-winning book by Larry McMurtry and set in the late nineteenth century, this sprawling epic of the Old West is the story of the last defiant frontier, a daring cattle drive, and an undying love.

programme.desc: Based upon the Pulitzer Prize-winning book by Larry McMurtry and set in the late nineteenth century, this sprawling epic of the Old West is the story of the last defiant frontier, a daring cattle drive, and an undying love.

programme.title: If You Want to Live... Shoot!
programme.desc: A framed miner caught in a land war must fight greed, betrayal, and his own haunted past.

programme.title: Ride in the Whirlwind
programme.desc: Three cowboys, mistaken for members of an outlaw gang, are relentlessly pursued by a posse.

programme.title: My Name is Pecos
programme.desc: Everyone wants to know who the Mexican is. He always answer slowly, "my name is Pecos".

programme.title: Fighters from Ave Maria
programme.desc: Western spaghetti set in gold rush times in California, involving circus acrobats, outlaws and a gold mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: To keep his invalid mother happy, an outlaw forces Lucas and Mark to go along with a masquerade that he is the owner of Lucas's ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A sharecropper enters his colt in a horse race hoping to win enough money to buy his farm from the owner who has bet on Mark McCain's entry.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas helps his former Army captain, now an undercover federal agent, infiltrate a gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas finds himself involved in murder when he gallantly steps to the aid of a beautiful woman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trying to protect Banker Hamilton's gold, Mark is kidnapped and held hostage at the McCain ranch and will be killed within the hour unless Lucas cooperates.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas makes a life-or-death decision when Micah is held hostage and the kidnappers demand the release of a notorious outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to do a good deed for the old town drunk but it backfires when the drunk's son believes he inherited Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: I Survived: Kristina/Jon/Amanda
programme.desc: What would you do if you were confronted with death? What gives someone the strength to survive? Is it luck, chance, instinct? In a stripped-down, simple-yet-cinematic interview style, I SURVIVED allows survivors to explain, in their own words, how they overcame unbelievable circumstances -- offering insight into what got them through an experience that changed their lives forever. programme.desc: Colin and Justin are at it again. This time purchasing a cottage of their own. They've fallen in love with the Haliburton Highlands – a part of Canada's cottage country named after their Scottish homeland. Though, this time around, the search for the perfect property is more challenging than ever. Realtor Rob has taken the boys on a seemingly never ending tour – over 40 cottages so far! The choice comes down to 3 unique properties and the boys are left weighing the odds. Will they take the gamble on the right one? The pressure's on!

programme.title: Colin & Justin's Cabin Pressure
programme.desc: Colin and Justin's cottage is on a tilt. A 'slanty shanty'. To fix this, the cottage needs to be jacked up for a new foundation to be built. All other work on the cottage comes to a standstill in order to get this done. Tensions build as the boys learn that the schedule needs to stretch – as does their budget. To maximize their time, they put their attention toward the shoreline. They remove the old, dingy dock and replace it with a newly designed one – an oasis from the construction chaos at the cottage.

programme.title: Colin & Justin's Cabin Pressure
programme.desc: Colin and Justin decide that their dock is in need of rescuing. Since Colin has never learned to swim and now is determined to rise to aquatic glory, the boys seek help to find a new dock that can be installed in time for their big bash – and the upcoming swimming lessons Colin has booked. Water wings in hand, tensions mount as they are running out of time to get all the odds and ends of the renovations completed. Desperate for a break, Colin has some water fun, while Justin urges him to get back to work! Will the new dock and Muskoka chairs make it in time? Justin goes off to fulfil his lifelong dream, to paddle his own strip wood canoe across a Canadian lake! But first he has to find a canoe that doesn't cost $3,000...

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Land of the Giants: Idaho Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Steve's quest for a giant mule deer buck continues in central Idaho. To help Steve in his journey, Ryan Callaghan has offered up one of his best spots as well as his keen spotting skills. The duo backpack hunt in some of the West's steepest and prettiest mountains seeking the colossal buck of Steve's dreams. In part two Steve finds the buck he's been searching for his whole life. The dream is realized and Steve and Ryan feast on a slow cooked roast.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Cooking Special: Butchering a Whole Deer
programme.desc: In this Cooking Special, Steve demonstrates how to butcher a whole whitetail deer.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Duren Deer Camp: Wisconsin Whitetail With Helen and Brittany Part 1
programme.desc: Helen Cho and Brittany Brothers are back for a double episode. This time around they're hunting whitetail deer in Wisconsin on the famed Duren farm with Doug Duren and Steve as their guides. Arriving a few days early to scout and tune up their shooting with some squirrel hunting, the ladies enter the next chapter of their hunting journey.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Duren Deer Camp: Wisconsin Whitetail With Helen and Brittany Part 2
programme.desc: Helen Cho and Brittany Brothers are back for a double episode.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Steve Makes the Team: Kentucky Small Game
programme.desc: Kevin Murphy and his band of Kentucky small game hunters introduce Steve to the finest Kentucky has to offer. Gray squirrels with tree hounds and cottontails with beagles, in Kentucky, it's the dogs that do the hunting. Cathead biscuits, sawmill gravy, and fried small game round out the Kentucky adventure.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: A Trip of Firsts: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steve and Janis head into the remote mountains of Sonora, Mexico, to pursue the elusive Coues deer.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to the historic beaver trapping grounds of Wyoming to explore the legacy of the mountain man era. As he sets traps along the Green River, Steve immerses himself in the methods and stories of early American trappers. Alongside his quest to catch beavers, he delves into the fascinating history of how beavers shaped the fur trade and American frontier life. It's a journey through both the rugged landscapes and the rich heritage of the American West.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and ecologist Karl Malcolm head to the Cibola National Forest, guided by a century-old tip from conservationist Aldo Leopold, to hunt Merriam's wild turkeys. Their adventure showcases the forest's rich history and the legacy of Leopold's conservation efforts while they track these elusive birds through challenging terrain.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Cooking Special: Smoked Meats With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Steven Rinella learns new culinary tricks from Chef Eduardo Garcia, a wild game enthusiast from Charged Film & Montana Mex. As Eduardo shares his expertise in smoking meats and preparing wild game dishes, Steve takes notes, eager to expand his culinary repertoire and bring fresh flavors to his own wild game cooking adventures.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins ranch manager and wildlife biologist Ben Binnion in Texas to explore the often-overlooked aspects of hog management. During the annual pig roundup, Steve learns about the ecological impact and challenges of controlling the hog population, providing a deeper understanding of the complexities of hunting and wildlife management in the Lone Star State.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads deep into Montana's rugged mountains to hunt black bears, reflecting on two decades of memories in this harsh yet captivating landscape. Joined by memories of his brother and their youthful adventures, Steve navigates grizzly country, contemplates the passage of time, and explores the evolving nature of hunting. Through encounters with both bears and the terrain, Steve seeks not just game but a connection to the past and the lessons it holds.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Nevada Mule Deer with Joe Rogan
programme.desc: Steven Rinella teams up with Joe Rogan in Nevada's high desert to bowhunt for elusive mule deer bucks. Surrounded by vast public lands and rugged terrain, they navigate the challenges of close-range stalking with their bows. With Joe's enthusiasm for archery and Steve's experience, the duo pushes their limits in pursuit of these wary deer, embracing the highs and lows of hunting in one of America's most unforgiving landscapes.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Janis are deep in the wilderness of eastern Alaska on a challenging moose and caribou hunt. Joined by Janis' father, Papa Jani, who wants one last adventure before age catches up, they endure the highs and lows of remote hunting. With patience wearing thin and the weather turning, the group pushes through thick willows and foggy mornings, hoping for a bit of luck and a successful hunt before their journey's end.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Janis are deep in the wilderness of eastern Alaska on a challenging moose and caribou hunt. Joined by Janis' father, Papa Jani, who wants one last adventure before age catches up, they endure the highs and lows of remote hunting. With patience wearing thin and the weather turning, the group pushes through thick willows and foggy mornings, hoping for a bit of luck and a successful hunt before their journey's end.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Prince Of Wales: Fishing and Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads back to his fish shack on Prince of Wales Island in Southeast Alaska, this time with friend and colleague Morgan Fallon. Known for his cinematography, Mo now wants to switch roles from behind the camera to filling his freezer. Together, they embark on a classic Alaskan adventure: fishing for rockfish, setting shrimp pots, and hunting Sitka blacktail deer, all while reminiscing about past trips and discovering new ways the wilderness shapes them.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting
programme.sub-title: Deer and Deer Hunting - "Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Whether you're hunting 10 acres or 1,000, how you handle boundaries, buck movement, and communication with neighboring hunters can make or break your season. The team shares real-world scenarios and proven strategies to foster cooperation, avoid conflict, and build relationships that lead to better deer hunting for everyone.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.sub-title: Hard Truths of Conservation - "The hunting heritage of South Africa
programme.desc: South Africa offers an incredible insight into the hunter and gatherer history of ancestors. Dan Cabela re-traces the footsteps of humanity's forefathers and explores how modern, private ownership of land has helped re-balance the human relationship with nature.

programme.title: Josh Sneed
programme.desc: It's hard being funny 24/7, but Josh Sneed does it, and that's why he became a stand-up comedian, to give his humor a “second chance at life.” In this Dry Bar Comedy special, Josh gives tips for people-watching (make sure your flash is off when you're taking pictures), and paints hilarious word caricatures of the people he's seen. Anyone who's been to Long John Silver's or Taco Bell (or the 2-in-1 version), will appreciate Josh's humor.

programme.title: K-Von
programme.desc: In his explosive return to Dry Bar, K-Von provides riotous explanations for President Biden falling up stairs, illegal salon activities, and the effects of being half-Persian.

programme.title: Brad Upton

programme.desc: Nick Guerra is loved by comedy audiences in clubs, corporate events, private parties, and colleges across the country, this guy tickles everyone's funny bone with his cool but energetic attitude, as he skewers relationships, family, and everyday life.

programme.title: Josh Fonokalafi
programme.desc: Joshua T Fonokalafi is a Utah based comedian from the mean streets of Ogden, Utahs own Compton. Raised in the Northwest and the son of an Islander immigrant, Joshua tells of his hardships growing up as one of the biggest minorities in the country. Joshua was most recently featured at the Idaho Laugh Fest and is preparing to film his very own comedy special with VidAngel. He's acted in Jackie and Ryan with Katherine Heigl, and in Certain Woman with Laura Dern and Kristen Stewart. Joshua's quick wit and humor will give you an amazing abdominal workout.

programme.title: The Price Is Right
programme.sub-title: Come on down!" "The Price Is Right
programme.desc: - hosted by Bob Barker until 2007 and Drew Carey thereafter -- features a wide variety of games and contests with the same basic challenge: Guess the prices of everyday (or not-quite-everyday) retail items. Four contestants, all of whom are seated in one of the wildest audiences in daytime game-show history, are called to the stage to play a preliminary pricing round. That winner joins the host on stage for one of more than 70 different pricing games. After three such games, the contestants spin a big wheel -- hoping to get as close to $1 as possible -- in the "Showcase Showdown." The two highest winners of that round advance to the final, where prizes could be cars or roomsful of furniture. A trio of models presents the prizes.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It With Mike Rowe
programme.desc: Before hosting Discovery's "Dirty Jobs," Mike Rowe had a program in San Francisco about folks on a mission -- mad scientists, eccentric collectors, devoted do-gooders -- called "Somebody's Gotta Do It." Now, CNN gives Rowe free rein to scour the country for people who, he says, "do what they do because of a weird mix of love, compulsion, obsession, dedication -- whatever it is. Those people have always interested me." The former series focused on the task, but this version spotlights the personality. Or, as he puts it: "More mission, less poop."

programme.title: Steve
programme.desc: For five seasons, Steve Harvey hosted a daytime talk show that was based in Chicago. In 2017, looking to focus more on celebrity guests, the show got a face-lift -- including shortening the title to simply "Steve" -- along with a move to Los Angeles, where there is no shortage of famous people for Harvey to welcome to his stage as guests. In addition to conducting interviews, Harvey brings his fresh -- and often funny -- perspective to the day's hot topics and Hollywood happenings. The show also features games and comedy and lifestyle segments. Whether he's chatting with a star or sharing his opinions on the news, Harvey does it as only he can.

Upon being released from the institution, Mike and his friend Reggie (Reggie Bannister) set out to track down the Tall Man and end his murderous and macabre practices. programme.title: Psycho IV: The Beginning

In the present, Norman lives with his pregnant wife, Connie (Donna Mitchell), fearing that his child will inherit his split personality disorder, and "Mother" will return to kill again.

programme.title: Saint Ange

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.sub-title: A One Legged Flamingo & A Two-toed Sloth

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: Both a giant anteater and a lesser anteater have had babies. Plus, Comet the young, giant anteater has to visit The Wildlife Docs. programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.sub-title: Best of Jungala: Orangutans, Tigers & Otters

We'll swing by the orangutans, go swimming with otters, be amazed by the majesty of tigers, and hang out with flying foxes - also known as mega-bats.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs

Plus, the team at Busch Gardens must move a 13,000 ppound Asian bull elephant to a new habitat. The elephant team has been working with Spike for months, training him to voluntarily enter a transportation crate that will be hoisted by a construction crane. Will Spike stay calm in the air?

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: The team has been hand raising two adorable cheetah cubs since they were several weeks old. Now, The Wildlife Docs must make sure they are healthy enough to move into their new home at the park. programme.title: Dr. Chris Pet Vet

programme.title: Dr. Chris Pet Vet

programme.title: Dr. Chris Pet Vet

programme.desc: A monster ant with a bite that could rival its name. Mark tests its jaws and explores its defense mechanisms in this up-close challenge.Why does parrot blood look so strange? Coyote analyzes its color, chemistry, and what secrets it may hold about avian evolution.

programme.desc: At long last, the bullet ant returns! Mark faces this infamous insect again to reveal updated insights into its sting—and why it's feared globally.Can gloves actually stop a venomous snake bite? Coyote puts bite-proof gear to the test against real fangs.

programme.title: Pinched by an Elephant Beetle!
programme.desc: The elephant beetle is huge, but its pinch may be even bigger. Coyote gets a close-up grip and tests its impressive strength.Coyote samples the infamous snake fruit. With a bizarre smell and unexpected flavor, it's a taste test that challenges more than just the tongue.

programme.title: Bullet Ant Challenge – Will It Sting?!
programme.desc: The ultimate challenge—Coyote revisits the infamous bullet ant to find out if the sting is truly as bad as legends say. Pain scale off the charts.Did Coyote really find a dinosaur? He uncovers a bizarre modern-day creature that looks like it crawled straight out of the Jurassic era.

programme.title: Ultimate Frog Scavenger Hunt!
programme.desc: Can Coyote catch every frog species in one day? This amphibian-packed episode follows a wild scavenger hunt in a lush ecosystem.A tiny puppy is covered in ticks. Coyote and team work quickly to remove them and explain the dangers of tick-borne illnesses.

programme.title: 24Hr Snake Hunt – The Clock Is Ticking!
programme.desc: One full day, one big mission—find a rare snake. Coyote races the clock to locate and document an elusive species before time runs out.Flying bullet ants sound bad—and they are. Mark takes on this airborne nightmare in a high-flying, high-pain sting test.

programme.title: Stung and Bit! Bullet Ant vs. Soldier Ant
programme.desc: What's worse—bitten or stung? Mark tests both by taking a bullet ant sting and a soldier ant bite back to back.Would you drink a smoothie made from puke fruit? Coyote samples this notoriously disgusting treat in the name of curiosity and culture.

programme.title: Frog Scavenger Hunt! – Can I Catch Them All?

programme.title: Big Angry Snake – Can It Be Rescued?

programme.title: Camera Trap Catches Rare Animal!
programme.desc: Coyote sets up a hidden camera trap and captures never-before-seen animal behavior in the wild. The footage is stunning and unexpected.One of Mark's most anticipated stings—the warrior wasp! With a pain rating system in place, he breaks down exactly how intense it is.

programme.title: Bullet Ant Box – Will I Get Stung?!
programme.desc: Back in the bullet ant box! Coyote endures more stings to test endurance, pain, and his own mental limits in this returning challenge.Being a snake milker is one of the world's most dangerous jobs. Coyote counts down the top 10 most intense moments in venom extraction.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown
programme.desc: When bad weather strikes, most people head in doors, but we head right into the heart of it. And now you can too, experiencing every thunderbolt, every dust storm, and every flood, all from the comfort of your own home. Let's jump right in!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Oh Hail No
programme.desc: What's windy, wild, and wet all over? The weather, of course! And over the next half hour, we're bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera! From the hailstorms that destory windows to the breathtaking tornados, we've got it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Porta Potties to the Wind
programme.desc: The world is a dangerous place, and with wild weather occurances happening every 20 seconds, it's no wonder we never have a shortage of footage to showcase here. The videos we have gathered are guarenteed to blow you away, so let's not waste anymore time and jump right into it.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | My Trashcan is Gone with the Wind

programme.title: Kipper
programme.desc: "Kipper" is an enchanting animated children's series that centers around the whimsical escapades of a lovable dog named Kipper. Alongside his friends, including Tiger the dog, Pig, and Arnold the piglet, Kipper embarks on a variety of adventures that emphasize friendship, curiosity, and the joy of discovery. The show is known for its gentle humor, engaging storytelling, and colorful animation that appeal to preschool-aged children. With each episode, young viewers are invited into Kipper's world where everyday experiences turn into magical explorations, fostering a love for learning and imagination.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Early on in babies' development, they begin to recognize primary colors such as blue, red, and yellow. And all the while, they're also processing an infinite variety of new sights and sounds. Think of the joy you'll experience as you introduce your little one to beautiful music and imagery with Baby Beethoven Symphony of Fun.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Lullaby takes your baby on a soothing journey with classical lullabies by Bach, Brahms and Mozart. Enjoy relaxing ocean waves, sweet puppet shows and tranquil images. From fun time to rest time, Baby Lullaby is the perfect way to spend special time with your baby.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Einstein: Let's Learn about Classical Music
programme.desc: Discover instruments through narration and repetition. Real-life images and sounds will engage viewers as they dance to upbeat classical favorites from Beethoven, Mozart and more. Join your favorite Baby Einstein characters to discover what makes each instrument unique!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Discovering Shapes: Circles, Squares, and More
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

They are brightly colored, jeweled manicures with tiny microchips inside that play songs when the wearer moves her hand. Each girl lines up to receive her new glamicure and soon there is a cacophony of color and sound.

programme.title: Top Talent
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival. Strawberry and Cherry are going to sing a duet, Orange is going to juggle, Plum will perform a ballet, Blueberry is writing and directing a play that the Berrykins will perform, Lemon will design animal-shaped hairstyles and display them herself, Princess Berrykin is going to yodel, and Berrykin Bloom will to do a stand-up comedy routine. Raspberry, who was the big star of the music recital (with only nine mistakes), is going to perform her same keyboard piece.

programme.title: A Star is Fashioned
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores—everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy. During Raspberry's preliminary trip to the city to begin arrangements for her new design studio, her friends get a taste of life without her. They miss her, and it makes them sad. Cherry admits to Strawberry that she's concerned for Raspberry—stardom is not all it's cracked up to be. We see that Cherry was worried about her friend, not jealous. Raspberry returns to pack up her little boutique. Her friends barely recognize her.

programme.title: Blippi's Alphabet and Transportation Adventures
programme.desc: Join Blippi on a series of exciting educational journeys where he uncovers the Case of the Missing ABCs, explores the charming Ranch at the Pier, and delves into London's rich transportation history at both the Transport Museum and the RAF Museum. From solving puzzles and meeting farm animals to discovering vintage buses and historic airplanes, Blippi makes learning an adventure filled with curiosity and fun.

programme.title: Blippi's Fun and Colorful Exploration
programme.desc: Get ready for a vibrant and entertaining escapade with Blippi as he dives into a world of colors at Billy Beez, creates a whimsical pizza in the kitchen, transforms into a playful pirate on a treasure hunt, and explores the fascinating world of dinosaurs at the Santa Barbara Museum of Natural History. Each adventure is packed with laughter, creativity, and educational moments, making learning a joyful experience for kids.

programme.title: The Berry Big Harvest
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store. Soon Orange's store is overflowing with Berry Bitty Fruits & Veggies. It's the berry first time Orange has not been able to find a “place for everything” in her store.

programme.title: Room at the Top
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom. Grateful for the support and not wanting to dampen anyone's enthusiasm, Strawberry tells each of them yes (actually, more like not-no).

programme.title: Don't Forget the Leaves!
programme.desc: Sid and his friends investigate and discover that leaves are food for animals, they provide shade, and they help make nutrients so flowers and trees can grow!

programme.title: The Bug Club
programme.desc: Sid and his friends use their magnifying glasses and discover ants, rolie polies, and caterpillars around the playground.

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Ruby's Ranger Adventure // The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: At Your Service // A Hard Rain
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Behind the Scenes // Paperdoll in Peril
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Singing in the Rain // Mail Carrier Mayhem
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Up in the Air // AdDRESSing the Problem
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Wakey Wakey // Rules of the Road
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: A Colorful Way to Cool Off // Seeing in Believing
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Leo The Wildlife Ranger
programme.sub-title: Yellow Crested Cockatoo / White Spotted Bamboo Shark
programme.desc: The Junior Rangers travel to the rainforest to take a yellow crested cockatoo home.

programme.title: Leo The Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: The Junior Rangers accompany a puffin home to Iceland.

programme.desc: Jelly Jamm celebrates music, fun and friendship.

programme.desc: Jelly Jamm celebrates music, fun and friendship.
